shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"disabled|shouldDirty|dirtyFields|isDirty\" src/logic src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx | head -240 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '200,340p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '420,500p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '820,955p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '800,885p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '360,430p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1100,1170p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1240,1300p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '930,1040p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"updateTouchAndDirty\\(\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1035,1085p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1420,1530p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1580,1620p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,210p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"setValue\\(["'^'"\\n]*shouldDirty|shouldDirty: true|shouldDirty: false\" src/__tests__ | head -100; sed -n '1,90p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx; sed -n '1,120p' src/__tests__/useForm/setValue.test.tsx 2>/dev/null || true"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"GetIsDirty\" src/types.ts src/types | head -20; rg -n \"_getDirty\\(\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '748,762p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '315,330p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '448,460p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '934,944p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '438,482p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/types/form.ts | head -120"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/types/form.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx | sed -n '1,220p'"
